message.content: {"items":[{"title":"Bundestag Election Study 1972 (Federal Republic of Germany)","url_or_doi":"https://doi.org/10.4232/1.0918","justification":"Study on the 1972 Federal Election in West Germany, covering voter behavior, party preferences, and evaluations of government and political institutions in the early 1970s."},{"title":"Bundestag Election Study 1976 (Federal Republic of Germany)","url_or_doi":"https://doi.org/10.4232/1.0919","justification":"Survey on the 1976 Federal Election examining parties, government performance, and attitudes toward the political system in West Germany in the mid‑1970s."},{"title":"Political Attitudes, Political Participation and Democracy in the Federal Republic of Germany 1973","url_or_doi":"https://doi.org/10.4232/1.0934","justification":"Focuses on political attitudes, evaluations of democracy, trust in institutions, and forms of participation in West Germany in 1973."},{"title":"Political Attitudes, Political Participation and Democracy in the Federal Republic of Germany 1977","url_or_doi":"https://doi.org/10.4232/1.0935","justification":"Continues the series on political attitudes and democratic orientations, including views of the political system and governmental institutions in 1977."},{"title":"Political Attitudes, Political Participation and Democracy in the Federal Republic of Germany 1979","url_or_doi":"https://doi.org/10.4232/1.0936","justification":"Late‑1970s survey on democratic support, governmental trust, and political participation in West Germany."},{"title":"German Social Survey (ALLBUS) 1980 – Historical Module: Retrospective Questions on the 1970s","url_or_doi":"https://doi.org/10.4232/1.13346","justification":"Although fielded in 1980, includes retrospective items about political attitudes, parties, and evaluations of government and politics during the 1970s in West Germany."},{"title":"Political Culture in the Federal Republic of Germany 1977","url_or_doi":"https://doi.org/10.4232/1.0942","justification":"Examines political culture, including images of the state, political institutions, and organizations in West Germany in 1977."},{"title":"Youth and Politics in the Federal Republic of Germany 1974","url_or_doi":"https://doi.org/10.4232/1.0951","justification":"Focuses on young people’s political orientations, party ties, and perceptions of governmental institutions in mid‑1970s West Germany."},{"title":"Public Attitudes toward Parties and Government in the Federal Republic of Germany 1975","url_or_doi":"https://doi.org/10.4232/1.0963","justification":"Survey on evaluations of parties, federal government, and political system performance in 1975."},{"title":"Political Participation and Organizational Membership in the Federal Republic of Germany 1976","url_or_doi":"https://doi.org/10.4232/1.0972","justification":"Investigates political participation, membership in political and civic organizations, and attitudes toward state and political order in 1976 West Germany."}]}
